title: Trump extends ceasefire indefinitely as Iran says it won’t join talks now
summary_full: The announcement came as talks set to take place between U.S. and Iranian delegations in Pakistan were postponed amid uncertainty about the broad strokes of a deal.
summary_public: The announcement came as talks set to take place between U.S. and Iranian delegations in Pakistan were postponed amid uncertainty about the broad strokes of a deal.

IR.label: neutral
IR.evidence: Trump extends ceasefire indefinitely as Iran says it won’t join talks
